title: Achyronia macrantha

taxonomy: Achyronia macrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, particularly in Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is classified as a member of the genus Achyronia, which is part of the subfamily Amaranthoideae. Further classification of Achyronia macrantha places it in the family Amaranthaceae, which includes over 2,000 species of flowering plants. This classification indicates the plant's evolutionary relationships with other species in the same family.

However, the plant's safety and efficacy have not been extensively studied, and its use should be approached with caution.
